statement: No implementation authority until the reader passes the comprehension gate (exit 0). The gate is fail-closed: it first re-hashes the active plan against CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json and refuses to certify anyone under authority drift; a wrong answer is DENIED.

oracle.test: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (executes the gate: correct reader exit 0, hallucinating reader exit 3)

statement: A slice lands only via The Eye's acceptance; every accepted slice records its PR, merge anchor, and reviewed head in the accepted-slice ledger, which must equal CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json#implementation_authority exactly.

Slice reviews run the signed council with the same required trio as authorization (claude/agy/codex; grok/gemini advisory) under trust_mode 'signed' — the 4a review's 13 rounds are all recorded per-seat.

oracle.evidence_probe: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (final review record: trust_mode signed, required signers, pr_head == reviewed_head)

statement: A slice's deterministic gate must converge at 'meets' on disk-verified facts before acceptance — a reviewer's approval never substitutes for the gate.
An acceptance that defers known minors must record them in a committed backlog artifact — deferral is explicit and revisitable, never silent.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (backlog file exists for every accepted slice that names one)

statement: Every pending slice has a frozen design substrate and per-task comprehension queries BEFORE implementation begins (documentation-first): an implementer of task N loads clotho/memory/ and passes comprehension-queries.<N>.json first.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (per-task query files exist for every pending slice)
